final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: game-concept-art
Asset type: game concept art / environment illustration, wide landscape
Primary request: a massive ancient dragon coiled atop a treasure hoard inside a volcanic lava cavern, medieval fantasy style
Scene/backdrop: deep interior of an active volcano — lava cave with molten rock flowing along the walls, a distant cave entrance letting in a sliver of cold moonlight
Subject: colossal ancient dragon with deep crimson and black interlaced scales, wings fully spread to fill most of the cavern space, eyes glowing with intense golden light; treasure mound beneath composed of gold coins, enchanted artifacts, ancient armor sets, and glowing magic gemstones
Style/medium: photorealistic digital painting, Dungeons & Dragons classic fantasy aesthetic, concept art illustration
Composition/framing: wide establishing shot, low camera angle looking up at the dragon, dramatic forced perspective emphasizing the dragon's scale
Lighting/mood: primary warm light from flowing lava — orange-red glow casting complex highlight and shadow patterns across the dragon scales; secondary cool light from distant moonlight at cave entrance creating a strong warm-cool contrast; epic, awe-inspiring, foreboding atmosphere
Color palette: deep crimson, charcoal black, orange-gold lava glow, cold silver-blue moonlight accent, glowing gem highlights (emerald, sapphire, ruby)
Materials/textures: overlapping dragon scales with specular lava reflections, rough volcanic rock walls with glowing lava veins, metallic sheen on gold coins and ancient armor, translucent glow on magic gemstones
Constraints: dragon must dominate the frame; lava flow must be visible on multiple cave walls; treasure hoard must include visibly distinct magical items; moonlight beam must be visible in the far background
Avoid: cartoonish proportions, flat lighting, oversaturated neon colors, modern elements, watermark
